description: Triage pass, not a new edge discovery. Both cards had existing [[eldrazi]] bullets in their Connections sections and were already listed in the cohort's appears_on frontmatter and Appears On wikilink block. The drift was purely at the prose-roster layer: neither card had a body entry in the 'Cards in our corpus pointing here' enumeration paragraph. Two entries written. Counter updated: 14 → 16. BFZ coverage caveat updated to name four BFZ anchors (was three) and acknowledge the new OGW anchor. MH3 count (eleven) unchanged — correct.

entries_written.placement: after Horrific Assault entry, at end of prose roster
after Kozilek's Sentinel entry, at end of prose roster

counters_updated.caveat_header: BFZ Eldrazi coverage → BFZ/OGW Eldrazi coverage

drift_detected: BFZ coverage caveat listed only three BFZ anchors and omitted Kozilek's Sentinel entirely despite it being in appears_on. OGW was not mentioned in the caveat at all. Both corrected in same pass.
